name: Feature request
about: Suggest a small addition that fits RocmTop's focused scope
title: "[feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!--
What problem are you trying to solve? Please describe the situation,
not a preferred solution. "I want X" is less useful than "I couldn't
tell at a glance when my GPU hit thermal throttling."
-->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Optional: if you have a specific UX or API in mind, describe it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they didn't fit. -->

## Scope check

<!--
RocmTop's scope: read a handful of amdgpu sysfs nodes and flip two of
them from a small tray-resident window. It is deliberately not a
benchmarking, overclocking, or multi-GPU tool. Please confirm your
request fits inside this scope.
-->

- [ ] This fits the project's stated scope (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
